name: firestore-tests
description: Emulator-backed security-rules tests for ../firestore.rules. NOT part of the shipped app — run against the Firestore emulator (see README/run command). The authoritative gate is firestore.rules; this suite proves it.

scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 users.rules.test.js announcements.rules.test.js visitor_invitations.rules.test.js maintenance_requests.rules.test.js ev_charging.rules.test.js ev_device_status.rules.test.js
